# CableFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable CableFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/cablefyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://cablefyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.cablefyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/cablefyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/cablefyi-embed
- API: https://cablefyi.com/developers/

## Network FYI Widget Family

- [TLDFYI Widget](https://widget.tldfyi.com)
- [IPFYI Widget](https://widget.ipfyi.com)
- [StatusCodeFYI Widget](https://widget.statuscodefyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
